src: KQL Queries. Defender For Endpoint and Azure Sentinel Hunting and Detection Queries in KQL. Out of the box KQL queries for: Advanced Hunting, Custom Detection, Analytics Rules & Hunting Rules.
ja: KQL クエリ集。Defender For Endpoint および Azure Sentinel 向けのハンティング・検出クエリ（KQL）。Advanced Hunting、Custom Detection、Analytics Rules、Hunting Rules にすぐ使えるクエリを収録。
